---
title: "Experience"
---

### Research Experience ###

March - June 2026

Project: **Transitional Justice Evaluation Tools** | [TJET Website](https://transitionaljusticedata.org/en/)

Supervisor: *Dr Geoffery Dancy*

- Contributed to one of the largest open-source repositories covering international justice

- Reviewed and logged in over 400 unique cases of domestic prosecutions in Bosnia and Herzegovina

- Sifted through over 100 names for further database review

- Scraped through several repositories to find information about court cases and criminal prosecutions

September 2025 - June 2026

Project: **UTM Undergraduate Journal of Political Science**

Supervisor: *Dr Alison Smith*

- Worked in a small team of 5 to set up the first undergraduate political science journal at the University of Toronto Mississauga campus.

- Served as the editor for submissions and co-reviewer for Comparative Politics & Book Reviews.

- Wrote 2 critical book reviews for relevant to journal culture & policies- Established guidelines & journal policies regarding citations & Ai Policies.

- Ran presentations in several classes to promote the journal to over 100 students, & outreached to MA students & candidates to serve as peer reviewers.

- Made the website for the first issue, & authored a guidebook on how to continue the website for prospective editors.



### Other Initiatives ###

Feb-March 2026

Event: **"Why Gandhi Rejected Violence in Mass Protest"**

Supervisor: *Dr. Jaby Mathew*

Helped plan and run the *Politics of Nonviolence: Traditions, Tensions, and Transformations* workshop as well as the *Why Gandhi Rejected Violence in Mass Protest* lecture seminar

<u>Promotional material for both events:</u>

<div style="display: flex; justify-content: flex-start; gap: 20px;">
  <img src="Photos/Gandhi Poster.jpg" style="width: 200px; height: auto;">
  <img src="Photos/Non-Violence Poster.jpg" style="width: 200px; height: auto;">
</div>
